ogTitle: Mira Mar vs Mirrabooka: Climate Safety

heading: Mira Mar vs Mirrabooka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mira Mar, Western Australia and Mirrabooka, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mira Mar has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mirrabooka (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mira Mar or Mirrabooka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mira Mar has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Mirrabooka scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mira Mar scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Mirrabooka scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mira Mar or Mirrabooka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mira Mar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
